description: Perform an orphan page audit on 'https://books.toscrape.com/' using Screaming Frog by cross-referencing the site's sitemap (located at 'https://books.toscrape.com/sitemap.xml' if available) against a crawl of the website. Export the 'Orphan Pages' and 'Internal HTML' reports as CSV files to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/'. Create a summary report at '~/Documents/SEO/reports/orphan_pages_report.txt' that includes the total URLs in the sitemap, total URLs crawled, the number of orphan pages found, and remediation recommendations. If the sitemap is unavailable, document its absence in the final report.
